emails.subject: Re: Credit Trading - Approval Form
emails.body: Re: Credit Trading Approval Form Although this makes a lot of sense, how are going to implement it? We plan to scale massively and I cannot imagine that this will be efficient enough to facilitate the time frames and number of reference credits that we are anticipating. I think that we need to have a general policy that we can look to instead of approving them on a one off basis. Let's discuss Tomas Valnek 19/05/2000 11:42

emails.subject: Re: Credit Trading - Approval Form
emails.body: I agree that the current Word document approval form will not be very practical once we scale up. Going forward, we could be looking at some kind of database solution as implemented for EnronOnline. TV Bryan Seyfried 20/05/2000 13:09
